block.text: You are being attacked by a Karossean Air-Fighter! ntis is a sleek, arrow-shaped robot. It can sprout legs to land on the ground, but it always fights in the shape of an aircraft. AIR-FIGHTER ARMOUR7 SPEED Fast sxn.L9 SPECIA L AblLtTIES: None If you defeat the Air-Fighter by reducing its ARMOUR to o, turn to 113. If your own robot's ARMOUR is reduced too, turn to 136.

choice.text: None If you defeat the Air-Fighter by reducing its ARMOUR to o.
. If your own robot's ARMOUR is reduced too.
